title: elatostema sessile var. cuspidatum
intro: Elatostema sessile var. cuspidatum is a variety of the Elatostema sessile plant, a species of flowering plant in the nettle family (Urticaceae). It is commonly known as a medicinal herb, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Elatostema sessile var. cuspidatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine in Southeast Asia.
